microEDA 1.0.1

Package index

All functions

add_taxonomy_prefix()
Add taxonomic prefixes to tax_table columns
agglomerate_taxa()
Agglomerate Taxa by Taxonomic Rank
check_taxonomic_consistency()
Check Taxonomic Consistency Across Higher-Level Classifications
filter_features()
Filter Features Based on Abundance and Prevalence
get_presence_list()
Get a List of Present Taxa by Group
get_taxa_overlaps()
Compute Taxa Overlaps and Specific Sets Across Groups
info() `info<-`() infoKeys() infoFields() taxrank() `taxrank<-`() transforms() `transforms<-`() mpa_version(<microEDA>) `mpa_version<-`(<microEDA>) filtered_taxa() `filtered_taxa<-`() filter_history() `filter_history<-`()
Get or set the info slot from a microEDA object
join_mpa_profiles()
Join multiple MetaPhlAn profiles
load_metaphlan()
Load a MetaPhlAn taxonomic profile from a file
merged_metaphlan_profiles
Merged MetaPhlAn4 profiles data
metaphlanProfile-class
A class to represent a MetaPhlAn profile
microEDA() show(<microEDA>)
A S4 class extending phyloseq for microbiome data analysis
mpa_taxProfile() `mpa_taxProfile<-`()
Get or set the MetaPhlAn taxonomic profile
mpa_version() `mpa_version<-`()
Get or set the MetaPhlAn database version.
`otu_table<-`(<microEDA>,<otu_table>)
Replace OTU table in a microEDA object
`phy_tree<-`(<microEDA>,<phylo>)
Replace phylogenetic tree in a microEDA object
plot_taxa_barchart()
Plot Taxonomic Composition of a microEDA/phyloseq Object
plot_taxa_heatmap()
Plot heatmap of taxon abundance or prevalence
plot_taxa_sankey()
Create a Sankey Plot of Taxonomic Abundances
plot_taxa_upset()
Create an UpSet Plot of Shared and Unique Taxa
`sample_data<-`()
Replace sample data in a microEDA object
show_filter_history()
Display Filter History for a microEDA Object
single_metaphlan_profile
SRS014476-Supragingival_plaque data
summary(<microEDA>)
Summarize a microEDA object
`tax_table<-`(<microEDA>,<taxonomyTable>)
Replace taxonomic table in a microEDA object
to_phyloseq()
Convert an object to a phyloseq object
trim_taxonomy_prefix()
Remove taxonomic prefixes from tax_table columns

Developed by Jérémy Rotzetter.
